description: Rasterize each page of a presentation PDF into a per-slide image (jpg or png) for visual inspection, using PyMuPDF (no external binaries).
rules: read-only on the input PDF; emits images + a manifest under record_store
images are written as slide-001.<fmt>, slide-002.<fmt>, ... under record_store
needs the PyMuPDF (fitz) library; degrades to a stub manifest when absent
usage: Set PDF_PATH; optionally DPI (default 150) and IMAGE_FORMAT (jpg|png, default jpg). Output: pdf_to_images.json manifest plus slide-NNN images.
limitation: PyMuPDF must be installed at run time. Converts the whole deck (no page-range knobs exposed here).
